sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n18385" key="a)fippolampa/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀφιππο-λαμπάς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">άδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n18385.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">torch-race on horseback,</tr_> ib. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">531</biblScope> </bibl> (ibid.).</sense> </entryFree>
